description: Plan builder scenarios — skill creation, plan template generation, tool composition

scenarios.description: Create a new troubleshooting skill from a description of the problem pattern.
scenarios.final_response: Created skill 'postgres-troubleshooting' with keywords [postgres, connection, replication, lag], categories [diagnostics, monitoring], and tool sequence: describe_pod → get_pod_logs → get_prometheus_query → get_events. Skill registered and available in the Toolbox. Future postgres-related queries will route through this skill.

scenarios.description: Auto-generate a skill from a successful incident resolution pattern.
scenarios.final_response: Scaffolded skill 'redis-connection-timeout' from the resolution of incident INC-2024-0112. Tool sequence extracted: get_pod_logs → describe_service → get_prometheus_query → restart_deployment. Root cause pattern: Redis connection pool exhaustion under load. Skill saved with reviewed=false — mark as reviewed in Toolbox after validation.

scenarios.description: Build a multi-phase investigation plan template for a recurring incident type.
scenarios.final_response: Created plan template 'database-connection-failure' with 4 phases: triage (identify affected services) → diagnose (check connection pools, query performance, replication lag) → remediate (restart connection pools or failover) → verify (confirm connections restored). Template saved and will auto-match incidents with category 'database'. Each phase has a 120s timeout and the verify phase runs always.

scenarios.description: Modify an existing skill to add new keywords and tools.
scenarios.final_response: Updated skill 'sre' to add keywords [etcd, leader, election] and tool get_prometheus_query to the requires_tools list. The skill will now match etcd-related queries and always include Prometheus querying capability.

scenarios.description: List available skills and describe their capabilities.
scenarios.final_response: 7 skills available: sre (cluster diagnostics, 72+ tools), security (scanning, 9 tools), view_designer (dashboards, data+view tools), capacity_planner (forecasting, analytics tools), plan_builder (skill CRUD, meta tools), postmortem (incident analysis, read-only), slo_management (SLO tracking, Prometheus tools). 2 auto-generated skills pending review: redis-connection-timeout, postgres-troubleshooting.
